plugins.name: coscientist-deep-research
plugins.description: 10-agent Expedition pipeline for end-to-end academic research. Discovers, triages, extracts, and synthesizes papers across Consensus, Semantic Scholar, and Google Scholar with three human-in-the-loop break points.

plugins.name: coscientist-retraction-mcp
plugins.description: Stdio MCP server for retraction status + PubPeer comments. Wraps Crossref update-to / updated-by fields and PubPeer's public publication API. Pure-stdlib networking; no API keys required.
